editor.label: Branch
editor.description: Select a branch for your server.

editor.label: Seed list
editor.description:
Each item must be on a separate line.
Once a seed (and possible world size) has been used, it will be removed from the list.
A seed can be combined with a world size with the following syntax: seed:size
Example:
1234567890:3500
89714174
1247417593

gameVariables.name: pluginName

editor.label: http://oxidemod.org/plugins/
editor.description:
Please write the valid URL of plugin from oxidemod.org</br>
For example: from http://oxidemod.org/plugins/metabolism.680/ you have to write only "metabolism.680" (without quotes)
editor.requiredMessage: You must enter the valid part of the URL!

editor.label: Yes
editor.description: Check this box to have the randomy selected seed from the field above be removed once used.

gameVariables.name: umodurl
gameVariables.requiredMessage: You need to enter a URL from uMods website

editor.label: uMod plugin URL
editor.description: Insert the full URL to the plugin page on uMod's website.
editor.requiredMessage: You need to enter a URL from uMods website

editor.label: Additional files/folders to wipe
editor.description:
Each file and folder should be on a separate line. Paths are relative to the service's root directory. Wildcards (*) are supported for files.
Please note: Folders should include a trailing slash.
Deleting a folder will also delete any files and subfolders inside.

Example:
logs/
log.txt
userdata/*.sav

editor.label: Use random seed
editor.description: If ticked, a random seed will be entered into your server.cfg.
